narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI-specific chips and related hardware continues to drive strong revenue growth and positive sentiment for semiconductor manufacturers and designers, with Nvidia's earnings reaffirming the trend.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
Nvidia guidance misses expectations
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are rapidly adopting AI-powered software and cloud services to enhance efficiency and innovation, driving growth for companies positioned in this space.
watchFor: Hyperscaler cloud revenue growth decelerates significantly
Enterprise AI project delays or budget cuts
Regulatory headwinds for AI development

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The market for GLP-1 obesity and related metabolic drugs continues to expand, driving R&D and strategic partnerships for pharmaceutical companies leading in this space.
watchFor: New competitors enter the GLP-1 market with superior efficacy/safety
Payer coverage for GLP-1s becomes more restrictive
Unexpected long-term side effects emerge from ongoing trials

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: The increasing complexity of IT environments and the rise of AI-driven threats are fueling demand for advanced cybersecurity solutions, particularly those focused on zero-trust and AI integration.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breach at a leading vendor
Enterprise IT spending cuts impact security budgets
New, cheaper open-source security solutions gain traction

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Leading internet content and information providers continue to benefit from strong digital advertising spending and growing engagement, especially with new AI-enhanced search capabilities.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in digital ad spending growth
New privacy regulations impacting ad targeting
Google's AI search monetization proves challenging

narratives.name: E-commerce Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite broader economic concerns, e-commerce platforms and discount retailers continue to show resilience and growth, benefiting from consumer demand for value and convenience.
watchFor: Retail sales data shows unexpected contraction
Major e-commerce platform reports slowing user growth
Increased regulatory scrutiny on platform fees

narratives.name: AI Data Center Power
narratives.thesis: The massive power requirements of AI data centers are creating a new demand cycle for networking equipment and related infrastructure, benefiting companies that provide these solutions.
watchFor: Data center buildout slows unexpectedly
Power grid capacity issues become a major bottleneck
Hyperscalers insource more networking solutions

narratives.name: Streaming Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: Streaming services are expanding their reach and monetization through ad-supported tiers and exploring new content verticals like sports, driving subscriber growth and revenue.
watchFor: Ad-supported tier growth stalls
Increased competition from new entrants or bundled services
Content costs rise significantly, impacting margins

narratives.name: Enterprise AI Hardware Demand
narratives.thesis: Strong enterprise demand for AI compute infrastructure and new product launches are driving positive sentiment and analyst upgrades for hardware providers.
watchFor: Corporate IT spending tightens unexpectedly
Increased competition from white-box server manufacturers
Dell's AI server backlog shrinks significantly

narratives.name: Home Improvement Demand
narratives.thesis: Despite a challenging housing market, strong online sales and professional segment momentum are supporting demand for home improvement retailers.
watchFor: Existing home sales plummet further
Consumer discretionary spending on home goods declines
Lowe's reports weak pro segment growth

narratives.name: Logistics Efficiency & AI
narratives.thesis: Logistics companies are demonstrating strong operational execution and leveraging AI for efficiency, particularly in specialized areas like medical logistics, driving positive sentiment.
watchFor: Global trade volumes decline unexpectedly
Fuel prices spike significantly
Increased regulatory pressure on safety standards

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Credit services companies are demonstrating resilience and growth through strategic partnerships, new product launches, and positive analyst sentiment, indicating robust consumer spending and financial health.
watchFor: Consumer spending slows significantly
Credit card delinquency rates rise sharply
Increased regulatory scrutiny on credit card fees

narratives.name: Residential Construction Headwinds
narratives.thesis: The residential construction industry is facing significant pressure from soaring mortgage rates and increasing legal challenges, leading to a bearish outlook for homebuilders.
watchFor: Mortgage rates fall below 6%
Government stimulus for housing market
Resolution of major lawsuits against homebuilders

narratives.name: Gold
narratives.thesis: Gold prices are influenced by a mix of factors including declining yields, a weaker dollar, and geopolitical tensions, leading to varied sentiment among traders.
watchFor: Real yields rise sharply
Dollar strengthens significantly
Major de-escalation of global conflicts

narratives.name: Silver
narratives.thesis: Silver prices are experiencing fluctuations driven by broader market trends, inflation concerns, and geopolitical developments, similar to gold but with additional industrial demand factors.
watchFor: Industrial demand for silver declines
Inflation expectations cool significantly
Stronger dollar impacts commodity prices

narratives.name: AI Optics Profit-Taking
narratives.thesis: After a significant run, some AI optics stocks are experiencing profit-taking, driven by insider selling and concerns about valuation, despite the broader AI narrative remaining strong.
watchFor: AAOI reports strong earnings and guidance
Renewed analyst upgrades for AI optics names
Significant new design wins announced

narratives.name: Satellite Communications Momentum
narratives.thesis: The satellite communications sector is gaining momentum with positive analyst sentiment and IPO buzz, indicating potential for future growth in space-based connectivity.
watchFor: Major launch failure or satellite malfunction
Increased regulatory hurdles for space-based internet
Competition from established telecom providers intensifies

Technology.thesis: The Technology sector remains broadly bullish, primarily driven by the relentless expansion of the AI infrastructure buildout. Strong earnings from key players like Nvidia and positive analyst sentiment across semiconductors and software indicate robust demand, despite some profit-taking in specific niches.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, killing duration bid for software
China export controls expand to HBM or advanced AI chips — significant supply chain disruption

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: The Consumer Cyclical sector is showing a mixed picture. While e-commerce and discount retail continue to demonstrate resilience and growth, the residential construction segment faces significant headwinds from rising mortgage rates and legal challenges.
watchFor: CPI print > 0.4% MoM — triggers higher rates, further hurting housing and discretionary spending
Consumer confidence index falls sharply below 90 — signals broad slowdown in discretionary spending
Mortgage rates break above 8% — further stifles residential construction

Communication Services.thesis: The Communication Services sector is mixed, with strong performance in digital advertising and content streaming, particularly with the growth of ad-supported tiers. However, social media companies are navigating restructuring and legal challenges, while some niche areas like satellite communications are building momentum.
watchFor: Major advertiser pulls back spending across platforms — signals broader ad market weakness
New streaming competitor gains significant market share — challenges existing content dominance
Regulatory action against social media platforms for content or data privacy

Industrials.thesis: The Industrials sector is mixed. While logistics companies are benefiting from strong execution and healthcare partnerships, and some heavy machinery is integral to data center construction, the sector faces headwinds from regulatory scrutiny in freight and geopolitical tensions impacting defense.
watchFor: Global trade tensions escalate — impacts freight volumes
New infrastructure spending bill fails to pass — dampens machinery demand
Major defense contract cancellations or budget cuts

Healthcare.thesis: Healthcare is mixed. The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive significant interest and R&D expansion for leaders, but the broader sector faces scrutiny over drug pricing and varying trial outcomes. Some areas are seeing AI integration for drug discovery.
watchFor: New GLP-1 trial data shows unexpected side effects or reduced efficacy
Increased government pressure on drug pricing and rebates
Major M&A in pharma fails due to regulatory hurdles

Financials.thesis: The Financials sector is mixed. While credit services show strength and some banks are active in analyst commentary and strategic moves, the broader banking sector is navigating a complex interest rate environment and regulatory scrutiny, with mixed signals on stability and growth.
watchFor: Fed signals unexpected rate cuts — compresses net interest margins for banks
Significant increase in loan defaults or credit card delinquencies
New banking regulations increase compliance costs

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The Consumer Defensive sector, specifically discount stores, is showing bullish momentum as consumers prioritize value amidst economic pressures, leading to strong sales and positive analyst outlooks.
watchFor: Inflation cools significantly, shifting consumer spending to discretionary items
Major discount retailer reports weak earnings or guidance
Increased competition from online value retailers

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are experiencing mixed signals, with some support from declining yields and a weaker dollar, but also facing potential headwinds from profit-taking and geopolitical developments.
watchFor: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 5% — increases opportunity cost of holding gold/silver
US Dollar Index (DXY) strengthens significantly — makes gold/silver more expensive for international buyers
Geopolitical tensions de-escalate rapidly — reduces safe-haven demand
